customCompress.adBody: Pick a photo or video to compress. Watch a short ad to unlock one for free.
customCompress.needsUpdate: This feature needs an updated app build. Please reinstall the latest version.

permissions.photosMessage: SwipeClean needs Photos and Videos access so you can review and clean your gallery.
permissions.cleanupMessage: SwipeClean needs access to your photos and videos so it can find heavy media on this device.
permissions.statusFull: Full access — all photos and videos

paywall.title: This is a Pro feature
paywall.genericMessage: Upgrade to SwipeClean Pro to unlock this feature.
paywall.videoCompression: Compress videos to reclaim the most space. Pro unlocks unlimited and batch video compression with a background queue.
paywall.advancedCompressionSettings: Fine-tune compression quality and presets. Advanced compression settings are part of Pro.
paywall.smartClean: Smart Clean finds duplicates, similar shots, blurry photos, screenshots, memes and large media to clean in one place.
paywall.advancedStats: See weekly and monthly cleanup reports, storage trends, and your full cleanup and compression history.

subscription.billingNotConfigured: Purchases are not configured for this build yet.
subscription.purchaseFailedMessage: We could not complete the purchase. Please try again.
subscription.restoredMessage: No active subscription was found for this store account.
subscription.billingDisclaimer: Payment is handled by the app store. Subscriptions renew automatically unless canceled in your store account.

smartClean.title: Smart Clean
smartClean.subtitle: Automatically find clutter to clean — duplicates, blurry shots, screenshots and more.
smartClean.recommendationsEmpty: Personalized cleanup suggestions will appear here once detection is available.
smartClean.permissionNeeded: Smart Clean works best with access to all your photos and videos.
smartClean.groupKeepBest: Keeping the best — review the rest

duplicatePhotos.title: Duplicate photos
duplicatePhotos.desc: Find exact copies of the same photo and keep just one.

similarPhotos.title: Similar photos
similarPhotos.desc: Group near-identical shots so you can keep the best one.

duplicateVideos.title: Duplicate videos
duplicateVideos.desc: Find duplicate video files taking up extra space.

blurryPhotos.title: Blurry photos
blurryPhotos.desc: Surface out-of-focus and low-quality photos to review.

screenshots.title: Screenshots
screenshots.desc: Round up screenshots you no longer need.

memes.title: Memes
memes.desc: Find saved memes and funny images to clear out.

largeVideos.title: Large videos
largeVideos.desc: Find the biggest videos eating your storage.

largePhotos.title: Large photos
largePhotos.desc: Find the largest photos to compress or remove.

advancedStats.title: Advanced stats
advancedStats.lockedMessage: Unlock weekly and monthly reports, storage trends, and full cleanup history.
advancedStats.emptyMessage: Delete or compress media and your cleanup reports will appear here.

settings.title: Settings
settings.biometricSubtitle: Use Face ID or Touch ID
settings.biometricNotEnrolled: No Face ID or Touch ID set up on this device
settings.appLockSubtitle: Require a passcode to open the app
settings.featureAfterUpdate: Available after the next app update
settings.systemLanguageHint: Uses your phone language when supported.
settings.cleanupRemindersSubtitle: A few nudges throughout the day
settings.cancelSubscriptionSubtitle: Manage or cancel your subscription in the store

lock.title: Enter Passcode
lock.subtitle: Enter your passcode to unlock SwipeClean
lock.unavailableMessage: App Lock will be available after the next app update.
lock.biometricUnavailableMessage: Biometric unlock will be available after the next app update.
lock.needAppLockMessage: Turn on App Lock and set a passcode before enabling biometric unlock.
lock.noBiometricMessage: Set up Face ID or Touch ID in your device settings to use biometric unlock.

reminders.cleanupBody: Swipe through a few photos and free up space.
reminders.compressionBody: Compress your large photos and videos to save space.
reminders.proBody: Smart Clean finds duplicates, blurry shots and more. Try Pro.

policy.title: After compression
policy.message: Choose what SwipeClean should do with original files after successful compression.
policy.confirmMessage:
SwipeClean will delete original photos/videos only after compression succeeds and the compressed file is verified.

This cannot be undone.

swipe.markedMessage: You have {{count}} {{noun}} marked for deletion in {{month}}. Review them before starting this selection over.
swipe.deleteMarkedMessage: You have {{count}} {{noun}} marked for deletion in this selection. Review and delete or restore them before starting over.

cleanup.heavySummary: We've identified {{size}} of heavy media that can be optimized without losing quality.
cleanup.emptySummary: No heavy media found yet. Large photos and videos will appear here when they are available.
cleanup.noHeavyMessage: Large photos and videos will appear here when they are available.

premium.title: SwipeClean Pro
premium.subtitle: A cleaner, faster version for people who want to review media without ads or friction.

reviewDelete.heading: Marked for Deletion
reviewDelete.deletionFailedFallback: Your marked photos are still safe.
reviewDelete.emptyStateMessage: Swipe left on {{mediaType}} to queue them here before permanent deletion.

compressionDetail.watchAdBody: Watch a short ad to compress this video.
compressionDetail.adNotReady: Ad isn't ready yet. Please try again in a moment.
compressionDetail.mediaNotFoundMessage: This item is no longer available in the device library.
compressionDetail.advancedQualityLocked: Quality presets are a Pro feature. Free uses the balanced default.
compressionDetail.compressionCompleted: Compressed copy saved to the device library.

compression.batchDecisionPrompt: What do you want to do with the originals?
compression.compressAllOriginalsPrompt: After each file is compressed, what should happen to the originals?
compression.singleDecisionPrompt: What do you want to do with the original file?
compression.noStorageSavedWarning: No storage was saved. Keeping the original is safest.

compressRun.title: Compressing
compressRun.hint: Keep this screen open while your file is compressed.
compressRun.deletePinHint: Enter your passcode to delete the original.
compressRun.cancelMessage: This file won't be compressed. Your original stays unchanged.

delete.title: Delete selected photos?
delete.message: This will permanently remove these photos from your device.

distribution.title: Swipe Distribution
distribution.emptyMessage: Start swiping photos to see your keep, delete and favorite breakdown.
